ONE WEEK OUT ⏳🔥
Our annual climbing competition is returning! Telegraph Turn-Up 2026 is almost here, and we are more excited thank ever.

Registration is STILL OPEN!
Open & Citizens: Regiser at mosaicboulders.com (link in bio)
Collegiate: Register through USAC website ‼️ CLOSES 2/18
*Get a FREE sticker with registration, designed by our very own @claire.an.climb 🎨
Citizens climbers are welcome at all difficulty levels (Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced)! Open & Collegiate finalists will battle it out for a cash purse in Open Finals 🤑🤑💸💸 Come challenge yourself and be part of the energy 💪

📅 February 21 & 22
📍 Mosaic Boulders
💥 Prices increase $10 day-of

Let’s pack the gym & turn it up!!! 🔥🔥

C’est parti pour les championnats de France seniors de bloc 2026 à @horizonverticalmontmartin ! @saam.richard s’offre ce 4ème bloc à son 3ème essai et confirme sa grande forme 🇫🇷

💪 : @saam.richard

Mosaic Boulders (Berkeley, CA)
Boulder QE registration opens 2/7 at 5pm PST and will close 2/18 at 11am PST. There are two sessions available to choose from. 
Check out the info sheet on the USA Climbing West Collegiate webpage. See link in bio.

This is for the engineers running (or trying to run) AI agents in production.

If you’ve been following the shift from "Copilot" to "Agent," you know the real challenge isn’t the LLM—it’s the engineering overhead. It’s the reliability issues, the state management, and the architectural shifts required to let an agent touch a codebase autonomously.

That’s why the MLOps Community is hosting Coding Agents: AI Driven Dev Conference.

We’re bringing the California dev scene together for one day at the Computer History Museum to pull back the curtain on the MLOps behind agentic workflows. We’ve invited the people actually shipping this tech, including speakers from ClaudeCode, OpenHands, Warp, and HumanLayer to share what’s working and what’s breaking in the real world.

No fluff. No high-level sales pitches. Just 8 hours of engineering depth.

Join us in Mountain View:
 📅 Tuesday, March 3rd 
🕘 9:30am – 5:30pm PST 
📍 Computer History Museum, Mountain View, California 
🎟️ Ticket Price: $400

Stop scrolling and start building the future of autonomous development: https://luma.com/codingagents

Mosaic Boulders’ annual open, collegiate, & citizens bouldering competition is back on February 21–22! 

THE LINEUP:
OPEN: Qualifiers Saturday. Top 5 advance to Finals.
CITIZENS: Three 3-hour rounds on Saturday. Choose your level: Beginner, Intermediate, or Advanced.
COLLEGIATE: The USAC portion of the event. Advanced climbers can even score into the Open Finals!

THE FINALS:
📍 Sunday @ 7:00 PM 
Come watch the strongest climbers battle for the podium. Spectators will be entered into a raffle for prizes from our sponsors!

REGISTRATION:
Save $10 by signing up early!
    •    Open: $40 Members / $50 Non-members
    •    Citizens: $20 Members / $30 Non-members
🔗 Link in bio to register, sign your waiver, and grab your slot!

We are incredibly excited and grateful to announce that Telegraph Turn-Up is sponsored by @oncrux_official!

We can’t wait to TURN UP with you all! Stay tuned for the day-of schedule. See you soon 👀

Today, there is a national call for a shutdown and strike in response to ICE operations in our communities. We stand in solidarity with those who are participating, and we recognize the grief, anger, and heartbreak that have led to this moment.
As a small, locally owned, community-rooted business, we know not everyone can step away from work, and we honor the many ways people choose to show up for themselves and each other. We believe that safe, welcoming spaces are especially important during times of fear, stress, and uncertainty.
For that reason, Mosaic Boulders will remain open today. Our goal is to create a safe and supportive space for our community, serving as a steady, positive presence for anyone who needs it.
We have zero tolerance for harm, hate, or intimidation of any kind. Mosaic is, and will always be, a space where everyone belongs. We believe in taking care of one another both on the wall and beyond it.

🗓️DATE CHANGE🗓️

Once again, things are Turning Up on Telegraph Avenue 👀 

Join us February 21-22 at Mosaic Boulders for TELEGRAPH TURN-UP, a climbing competition hosted in our very own @telegraphberkeley neighborhood! 

Categories include:
💪 Open (M’s, W’s, Nonbinary)
💪 Citizens (M’s, W’s, Nonbinary)
💪 Collegiate

Registration information coming soon. Stay tuned & get ready to TURN UP 🤝
